feature: Create a /doc-suite slash command that invokes the existing doc-orchestrator agent, and integrate cartography delta processing as a new phase within it. The current start:cartography SessionStart hook fails silently because CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is not set and the 30s timeout is too short for agent invocation. The stop:cartography hook (delta writer) works fine and stays unchanged. The start:cartography hook should become a thin reminder pointing users to /doc-suite. Key findings from prior analysis: cartography.rs is 2728 lines (needs decomposition), detect_project_type is duplicated with ecc-app::detection::framework, classify_file is domain logic in adapter layer, slug derivation is split across 3 locations, TOCTOU file lock needs shell flock(1), and agent output uses content-sniffing instead of structured protocol.
